message.content:
Explore the PointsDetail screen implementation and related files. I need to understand:

1. The full structure of src/screens/PointsDetail/ - all files, especially index.ts (hook), view.tsx (render), and Models/
2. What DS components are used (imports from @semparar/design-system-app)
3. What store data it needs (Zustand slices, selectors)
4. What navigation params it receives
5. What different states/views it can show (voucher, cashback, expired, etc.)

Also read the existing story patterns:
- src/__stories__/PointsScreen.stories.tsx (for patterns)
- src/__stories__/ExtractScreen.stories.tsx (for patterns)

Provide the FULL content of view.tsx and index.ts for PointsDetail, and summarize the key patterns from existing stories.

content.content:
1→import {
     2→  BackDropBottom,
     3→  Box,
     4→  Button,
     5→  CardActivity,
     6→  DetailTransactionValue,
     7→  SeparatorHorizontal,
     8→  TagLabel,
     9→  Text,
    10→} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    11→import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
    12→import React, { FC } from 'react';
    13→import { Linking } from 'react-native';
    14→import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
    15→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
    16→import { moment } from '../../services/moment';
    17→import { formatToCurrency } from '../../utils/functions';
    18→import { PointsDetailProps } from './Models';
    19→import {
    20→  getDetailScreenTitle,
    21→  getFormattedHighlightText,
    22→  getFormattedPointsValue,
    23→  getOrigin,
    24→  getPurchaseTypeLabel,
    25→  getTagSubType,
    26→  getTransactionGainType,
    27→  getVehicleInfo,
    28→} from './utils';
    29→
    30→const PointsDetailView: FC<PointsDetailProps> = ({
    31→  handleGoBack,
    32→  transaction,
    33→  modalizeRef,
    34→  handleOpenReportProblem,
    35→  handleCloseReportProblem,
    36→}) => {
    37→  const gainType = getTransactionGainType(transaction);
    38→  const tagSubType = getTagSubType(transaction);
    39→  const screenTitle = getDetailScreenTitle(gainType, transaction.type);
    40→  const vehicleInfo = getVehicleInfo(transaction);
    41→  const purchaseTypeLabel = getPurchaseTypeLabel(tagSubType);
    42→  const origin = getOrigin(transaction);
    43→  const formattedCurrencyValue = formatToCurrency(transaction.currencyValue);
    44→  const formattedPointsValue = getFormattedPointsValue(
    45→    transaction.amount,
    46→    transaction.type,
    47→  );
    48→  const cardTitle = transaction.description || '';
    49→  const highlightText = getFormattedHighlightText(
    50→    transaction.date,
    51→    gainType,
    52→    moment,
    53→  );
    54→
    55→  const renderDivider = () => {
    56→    return (
    57→      <SeparatorHorizontal
    58→        borderWidth="smaller"
    59→        borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
    60→        height={1}
    61→        width="100%"
    62→        mt="xxxxs"
    63→      />
    64→    );
    65→  };
    66→
    67→  const renderTagContent = () => {
    68→    const hasVehicleInfo = !!vehicleInfo && vehicleInfo !== '';
    69→    const shouldShowOrigin = origin && !hasVehicleInfo;
    70→    const hasPurchaseTypeLabel =
    71→      !!purchaseTypeLabel && purchaseTypeLabel !== '';
    72→
    73→    return (
    74→      <>
    75→        {renderDivider()}
    76→        {shouldShowOrigin && (
    77→          <>
    78→            <Text
    79→              type="paragraphXL"
    80→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    81→              mb="xxxxs"
    82→              mt="xxxxs"
    83→            >
    84→              Origem
    85→            </Text>
    86→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
    87→              {origin}
    88→            </Text>
    89→            {renderDivider()}
    90→          </>
    91→        )}
    92→        {hasVehicleInfo && (
    93→          <>
    94→            <Text
    95→              type="paragraphXL"
    96→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    97→              mb="xxxxs"
    98→              mt="xxxxs"
    99→            >
   100→              Tag
   101→            </Text>
   102→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   103→              {vehicleInfo}
   104→            </Text>
   105→            {renderDivider()}
   106→          </>
   107→        )}
   108→
   109→        {hasPurchaseTypeLabel && (
   110→          <>
   111→            <Text
   112→              type="paragraphXL"
   113→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   114→              mb="xxxxs"
   115→              mt="xxxxs"
   116→            >
   117→              Tipo de compra
   118→            </Text>
   119→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   120→              {purchaseTypeLabel}
   121→            </Text>
   122→          </>
   123→        )}
   124→      </>
   125→    );
   126→  };
   127→
   128→  return (
   129→    <>
   130→      <BasicScreen
   131→        title={screenTitle}
   132→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
   133→        hasScroll
   134→        errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
   135→      >
   136→        <DetailTransactionValue
   137→          icon={transaction.icon as never}
   138→          title={cardTitle}
   139→          titleColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   140→          iconBgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   141→          points={formattedPointsValue}
   142→          bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   143→          pointsColor={
   144→            transaction.type === 'CREDIT' || transaction.type === 'REFUNDED'
   145→              ? 'PLUS_COLOR_02'
   146→              : ('INTENSE_COLOR_05' as const)
   147→          }
   148→        />
   149→
   150→        <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" mt="xxxxs" flex={1}>
   151→          <TagLabel
   152→            icon={undefined}
   153→            type="neutral"
   154→            text={highlightText}
   155→            showSpacing
   156→          />
   157→
   158→          <Box mt="xxxs" flex={1} width="100%">
   159→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs">
   160→              Valor
   161→            </Text>
   162→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   163→              {formattedCurrencyValue}
   164→            </Text>
   165→
   166→            {gainType === 'TAG' && renderTagContent()}
   167→          </Box>
   168→
   169→          <Box width="100%" align="flex-end" mb="small">
   170→            <Button
   171→              type="secundaryLarge"
   172→              text="Relatar Problema"
   173→              onPress={handleOpenReportProblem}
   174→            />
   175→          </Box>
   176→        </Box>
   177→      </BasicScreen>
   178→
   179→      <BackDropBottom modalizeRef={modalizeRef as PropsModalizeRef}>
   180→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxs">
   181→          <Box align="center" width="100%">
   182→            <Text
   183→              type="paragraphXXXL"
   184→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   185→              mb="xs"
   186→              align="center"
   187→            >
   188→              Central de Atendimento
   189→            </Text>
   190→          </Box>
   191→        </Box>
   192→
   193→        <Box pd="innerSmall">
   194→          <CardActivity
   195→            mt="nano"
   196→            icon="icon-contact"
   197→            title="Capitais"
   198→            description="4002 1552"
   199→            iconRight="icon-next"
   200→            showIcon
   201→            showTagLabel={false}
   202→            onPress={() => {
   203→              eventSelectContent({
   204→                content_type: 'cta',
   205→                content_id: 'telefones_capitais',
   206→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   207→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   208→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   209→              });
   210→              Linking.openURL('tel:40021552');
   211→            }}
   212→          />
   213→
   214→          <CardActivity
   215→            mt="nano"
   216→            icon="icon-contact"
   217→            title="Demais localidades"
   218→            description="0800 015 0252"
   219→            iconRight="icon-next"
   220→            showIcon
   221→            showTagLabel={false}
   222→            onPress={() => {
   223→              eventSelectContent({
   224→                content_type: 'cta',
   225→                content_id: 'telefones_demais_localidades',
   226→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   227→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   228→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   229→              });
   230→
   231→              Linking.openURL('tel:08000150252');
   232→            }}
   233→          />
   234→          <Text type="paragraphXS" color="INTENSE_COLOR_04" mt="xxxxs">
   235→            *Atendimento de segunda à sexta das 9h às 21h. Sábado e domingo das
   236→            9h às 17h.
   237→          </Text>
   238→        </Box>
   239→
   240→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxxxs">
   241→          <Text
   242→            type="linkMDM"
   243→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
   244→            onPress={handleCloseReportProblem}
   245→            align="center"
   246→          >
   247→            Fechar
   248→          </Text>
   249→        </Box>
   250→      </BackDropBottom>
   251→    </>
   252→  );
   253→};
   254→
   255→export default PointsDetailView;
   256→

content.text: Let me check the STYLE_GUIDE as mentioned in CLAUDE.md and look at the atomic templates:

content.content:
1→# Frontend Style Guide — Sem Parar (Zustand-only + Hook Component Pattern)
     2→
     3→Welcome to the **Sem Parar Frontend Style Guide**.  
     4→This version consolidates: **Zustand as the only state manager**, **Hook Component pattern** for Screens and Atomic components, **services architecture (SOLID)**, and an **cache pattern**.
     5→
     6→> Sit down, have a cup of coffee and read this calmly. ☕
     7→
     8→---
     9→
    10→## :pushpin: Table of Contents
    11→
    12→- [Introduction](#introduction)
    13→- [Components & Screens — Hook Component Pattern](#components--screens--hook-component-pattern)
    14→- [Atomic Components — Hook Component Pattern](#atomic-components--hook-component-pattern)
    15→- [Project Organization](#project-organization)
    16→- [Services Architecture](#services-architecture)
    17→- [State Management (Zustand-only)](#state-management-zustand-only)
    18→- [Routes Naming](#routes-naming)
    19→- [Folder Naming Rules](#folder-naming-rules)
    20→- [Code Standards](#code-standards)
    21→- [Styles Patterns](#styles-patterns)
    22→- [Cache Pattern](#cache-pattern)
    23→- [Checklist](#checklist)
    24→
    25→---
    26→
    27→## Introduction
    28→
    29→The goal of this guide is to ensure **consistency, testability and scalability** across our frontend projects.
    30→
    31→Key decisions:
    32→
    33→- **Zustand** is the **exclusive** global/shared state manager.
    34→- UI follows the **Hook Component** pattern (logic hook + dumb view).
    35→- Domain logic lives in **`/services`** with **SOLID** layering.
    36→- Cache is **typed and reusable**.
    37→
    38→---
    39→
    40→## Components & Screens — Hook Component Pattern
    41→
    42→Each screen is split into a logic hook and a render-only component.
    43→
    44→```
    45→screens/Home/
    46→├── index.ts        # logic: export useHomeScreen()
    47→├── view.tsx        # render: export default HomeScreen
    48→└── Models/
    49→    └── index.d.ts    # types (Props, State, Handlers, Return)
    50→```
    51→
    52→**Models/index.d.ts**
    53→
    54→```ts
    55→export interface HomeParams {
    56→  welcome?: string;
    57→}
    58→export interface HomeState {
    59→  greeting: string;
    60→  isLoading: boolean;
    61→}
    62→export interface HomeHandlers {
    63→  onPressCTA: () => void;
    64→}
    65→export type UseHomeReturn = HomeState & HomeHandlers;
    66→```
    67→
    68→**index.ts (logic hook)**
    69→
    70→```ts
    71→import { useCallback, useMemo, useState, useEffect } from 'react';
    72→import type { HomeParams, UseHomeReturn } from './Models';
    73→import { useUserStore } from '@/services/user/store'; // Zustand slice example
    74→
    75→export function useHomeScreen(params?: HomeParams): UseHomeReturn {
    76→  const name = useUserStore(s => s.name);
    77→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
    78→
    79→  useEffect(() => {
    80→    const t = setTimeout(() => setIsLoading(false), 300);
    81→    return () => clearTimeout(t);
    82→  }, []);
    83→
    84→  const greeting = useMemo(
    85→    () => params?.welcome ?? `Hello, ${name || 'guest'}!`,
    86→    [
    87→      params?.welcome,
    88→      name,
    89→    ],
    90→  );
    91→
    92→  const onPressCTA = useCallback(() => {
    93→    // Call services, analytics, navigation, etc.
    94→  }, []);
    95→
    96→  return {
    97→    greeting,
    98→    isLoading,
    99→    onPressCTA,
   100→  };
   101→}
   102→```
   103→
   104→**view.tsx (render)**
   105→
   106→```tsx
   107→import React from 'react';
   108→import { View } from 'react-native';
   109→import { Text, Button } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
   110→import { useHomeScreen } from './index';
   111→import type { HomeParams } from './Models';
   112→
   113→type Props = HomeParams;
   114→
   115→export default function HomeScreen(props: Props) {
   116→  const { greeting, isLoading, onPressCTA } = useHomeScreen(props);
   117→
   118→  if (isLoading) {
   119→    return (
   120→      <View>
   121→        <Text>Loading...</Text>
   122→      </View>
   123→    );
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  return (
   127→    <View>
   128→      <Text>{greeting}</Text>
   129→      <Button onPress={onPressCTA} text="Continue" />
   130→    </View>
   131→  );
   132→}
   133→```
   134→
   135→---
   136→
   137→## Atomic Components — Hook Component Pattern
   138→
   139→```
   140→atomic/atoms/Button/
   141→├── index.ts        # logic: export useButton()
   142→├── view.tsx        # render: export default Button
   143→└── Models/
   144→    └── index.d.ts
   145→```
   146→
   147→**Models/index.d.ts**
   148→
   149→```ts
   150→export interface ButtonProps {
